changelog: Synced all hardcoded fallback prompt texts with actual prompt.md source files (Unified AI Prompt v4, Issues Tracking, Audit Spec v1 — all had stale/abbreviated text)
Fixed computeBundledVersion to include text length in hash — text-only changes now trigger DB re-seeding
Fixed Audit Spec v1 id mismatch: 'default-audit' → 'default-audit-spec' (matching info.json)
